_instructions: Copy this object into custom-node-list.json in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI-Manager
author: THE-ANGEL-AI
title: LTX-2 MultiGPU (Hybrid Split for 2×T4 / Kaggle)
description: Hybrid Multi-GPU split loader for LTX 2.3 GGUF on 2×T4 (Kaggle). Replaces DisTorch2 regex splitting with explicit block-aware sharding — distributes 44 DiT transformer blocks across 2 GPUs with forward-hook hidden-state transfer. 7 nodes: 🔀 Splitter (HybridSplitLoader), 📝 Dual CLIP Loader (GemmaHybridLoader), 🩺 VRAM Diagnostics (MemoryDiagnostics), ⚙️ GPU Strategy Switch (DeviceStrategy), 🅿️ VRAM Parking (VRAMParking), ⚡ SageAttention T4 Turbo, 🖼️ VAE Loader with GPU select. Requires ComfyUI-GGUF (city96). Optimised for Kaggle T4×2 (2×14.5 GB VRAM, 29 GB RAM). Unsloth Dynamic 2.0 GGUF compatible. GPL-3.0-or-later.
